name: Suminoe Textile Co., Ltd.
summary: Suminoe Textile Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells interior fittings, automotive textile and traffic facilities, and functional materials in Japan, North and Central America, Asia, and internationally. The company offers curtains, carpet tiles, rugs and mats, and wall papers for use in various buildings; seat covering and ceiling materials, floor carpets, and car mats for automobile manufacturers; and cushion materials for use in public transportation vehicles comprising trains, buses, ships, and aircraft. It also provides fiber materials for interior products and automotive textiles, as well as dust control mats and brushes for house cleaning, etc.; electric carpets for home appliance manufacturers; air-filter products; stationary deodorizers for home use; and flooring material for public facilities, etc. In addition, the company offers art and craft textiles, including plush hand-woven curtains, hand-woven carpets, and hooked rugs, as well as brocades and flags; and processes silicon wafers for solar cells. Suminoe Textile Co., Ltd. was founded in 1883 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
